title: STOCK MARKET ARENA
blurb: What if you could own a piece of your favorite company? Today you'll learn how stocks make that real!
mission: Learn that a stock is a tiny piece of a company you can own.
what: A stock is a tiny piece of a company that you can own.
key: When the company does well, your tiny piece can grow.
swapGood: “I own a piece of a company I believe in.”
intro: Here's how owning a piece works…
rule: Buy pieces of good companies and hold a long time.
star: One share makes you a real owner!
goal: “Own 1 share for $50 and hold it 5 years.”
smartTip: You're an owner, not a gambler!
gbBody: Some moves make you a smart owner; others are risky guesses.
gbKey: Own good companies, not lucky guesses.
badWarn: Guessing can lose your money fast!
goodNote: Smart owners grow with their company!

title: PORTFOLIO HQ
blurb: Putting all your money in one spot is risky! Today you'll learn to spread it out and stay safe.
mission: Learn to spread your money across many things so one drop won't hurt.
what: To diversify is to spread your money across many things.
key: If one thing drops, the others can hold you up.
swapBad: “I'll put it all in one stock.”
swapGood: “I'll spread it across a few different ones.”
intro: Don't put all your eggs in one spot…
rule: Never put all your money in one place.
star: A mix keeps one drop from hurting you.
goal: “Split $100 across 3 different things, not just one.”
smartTip: A good mix rides out the bumps!
gbBody: Spreading money out is safer than stacking it all in one place.
gbKey: Many baskets beat one big basket.
badWarn: If your one pick drops, you lose it all!
goodNote: A balanced mix keeps you steady!

title: RESEARCH CORE
blurb: Smart investors do their homework first! Today you'll learn to research before you put money in.
mission: Learn to study a company before you invest in it.
what: Research is studying a company before you invest.
key: Knowing the facts beats guessing every time.
swapGood: “I read the facts and understand this company.”
intro: Before you invest, find out the facts…
rule: Never invest in something you don't understand.
goal: “Read 3 facts about a company before buying any share.”
gbBody: Investing on facts is far safer than acting on rumors.
badWarn: Buying blind is a costly mistake!

title: DIVIDEND DISTRICT
blurb: Some stocks pay you just for owning them! Today you'll learn how money can grow while you sleep.
mission: Learn how dividends pay you and how reinvesting them grows your money.
what: A dividend is cash a company pays you for owning its stock.
key: Reinvest your dividends and your money grows on itself.
swapBad: “I only make money if I sell.”
swapGood: “My shares pay me cash while I hold them.”
intro: Watch your money pay you more money…
goal: “Reinvest $3 in dividends each year to grow faster.”
smartTip: Time turns small payments into big growth!
gbBody: Reinvesting dividends grows money; spending them stops the snowball.
badWarn: Spending dividends stops your money from growing!

title: ASSET REALM
blurb: Some things you own get more valuable over time! Today you'll learn what assets are and why they grow.
mission: Learn what assets are and how they grow in value over time.
what: An asset is something you own that can grow in value.
key: Good assets are worth more later than they cost today.
swapBad: “I'll spend it on something that fades.”
swapGood: “I'll buy something that grows in value.”
intro: Pick things that grow, not fade…
rule: Buy assets that grow, not toys that fade.
star: Assets turn today's money into more tomorrow.
goal: “Buy a $100 asset that could be worth $200 in 10 years.”
smartTip: Assets work for you while you wait!
gbBody: Assets grow in value while faders lose it the moment you buy.
badWarn: Faders shrink your money over time!
goodNote: Growers turn money into more money!

title: RISK CONTROL CENTER
blurb: Every investment has some risk! Today you'll learn how to protect your money and stay safe.
mission: Learn to manage risk so a drop never wipes out your money.
what: Risk is the chance an investment loses value.
key: You can't erase risk, but you can manage it wisely.
swapBad: “I'll bet it all to win big.”
swapGood: “I'll risk only what I can afford to lose.”
intro: Protect your money before chasing gains…
star: Managing risk keeps you in the game.
goal: “Keep $20 safe and only invest money you won't need soon.”
smartTip: Safe and steady wins the race!
gbBody: Safe moves protect your money; reckless ones can wipe it out.
tip: Only risk what you can lose.
badWarn: One reckless bet can wipe you out!
goodNote: Smart caution keeps your money safe!

title: INVESTOR ACADEMY
blurb: The best investors play the long game! Today you'll learn the strategy that builds real wealth over time.
mission: Learn that patience and a long-term plan beat quick wins.
what: Long-term investing means holding for many years to let money grow.
key: Time in the market beats trying to time the market.
swapBad: “I want to get rich this week.”
swapGood: “I'll grow my money steadily over years.”
intro: Great investors think in years, not days…
rule: Time in the market beats timing the market.
goal: “Invest $10 a month for 10 years toward a big goal.”
gbBody: Patient investors build wealth; rushed ones chase quick wins and lose.
goodNote: The long game builds real wealth!
